subject: ARLO SEO — Weekly Pulse — 2026-07-10
html:
Week 3 Pulse

Shipped this week: /compare/agencyanalytics-vs-arlo + llms.txt coverage for all 6 live connector/compare pages (see worklog 2026-07-09). Below is where the numbers stand — several are still pending because the automated data pulls (GSC/GA4) aren't wired into this sandbox yet.

Leads proxy (GA4 conversions)

Pending — GA4 (G-CP22NBPLFP) is firing per the 2026-07-04 session, but this sandbox has no outbound GA4 API access. A scheduled data Action needs to pull conversion counts and backfill this row.

Ranking movement

KeywordLast wkNowTrend
No data — see \"Anything broken\" below

Traffic vs last week

Pending — same root cause as rankings: no SE Ranking tracking project and no reachable GSC/GA4 in this sandbox. SE Ranking's own organic-keyword index also returns zero rows for askarlo.app in both US and CA databases (checked live this session), consistent with a domain too new/thin for their crawler to have indexed anything yet.

Anything broken?

Yes — rank tracking was never set up. Checked the SE Ranking account this session: there is no project for askarlo.app among the 33 tracked sites, and getDomainKeywords/getDomainOverviewByCountry return zero organic keywords for the domain in both US and CA. The 12-week strategy's Week 1\u20132 KPIs (\"first tracked rankings,\" \"tracked in SE Ranking\") haven't actually been met \u2014 three weeks of shipped pages (connector matrix + 2 comparison pages) have zero rank visibility. Didn't create the tracking project myself this session (that commits the account to ongoing paid keyword tracking \u2014 a setup decision, not a reporting one) but flagging it as the top priority for a human or a dedicated session to do deliberately: create an SE Ranking project for askarlo.app, add the P1 keyword list from audits/keyword-research.md (mcp connector, google analytics mcp, google ads mcp, claude mcp server, mcp for marketing, supermetrics alternative, agencyanalytics alternative, whatagraph alternative), Google US + CA search engines, daily or weekly checks. Everything else (build gate, deploys) looks healthy per the worklog \u2014 no build regressions reported this session.

Reading the week

Content velocity is on pace \u2014 comparison hub now has 3 pages (Supermetrics, Windsor, AgencyAnalytics) and the connector matrix has 3 (GA4, Google Ads, Search Console), all cross-linked via llms.txt. But the strategy is flying blind: without a live rank tracker, there's no way to tell whether any of this is moving the needle before Week 8's reporting infra even exists. Recommend making \"stand up SE Ranking tracking\" the very next NEXT item, ahead of the Whatagraph comparison page \u2014 a comparison page with no visibility into whether Week 1\u20132's pages are ranking is lower-value than closing the measurement gap.
